library.name: smalot/pdfparser
library.description: Pure-PHP PDF text extractor. Used by \local_aigrader\extractor\pdf_extractor to read student PDF submissions without requiring a system-level pdftotext binary.

library.name: symfony/polyfill-mbstring
library.description: Polyfill that provides the mb_* string functions on PHP installs without the mbstring extension. Transitive dependency of smalot/pdfparser; effectively a no-op on Moodle hosts that already ship mbstring.
